# line1ImageProvider

**Instance Property**

The image to display.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var line1ImageProvider: CLKFullColorImageProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

This image provider produces a full-color image, masked to a circle.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **line2TextProvider**: The text to display below the image.

items.description: The text to display below the image.
